name: 3pk Milky Glass Everyday Fragrances Candle Gift Set Jar Candle - Threshold™
description:
Delight your loved ones with the 3pk Milky Glass Everyday Fragrances Candle Gift Set Jar Candle from Threshold™. Featuring a luxurious blend of scents, including charcoal, lavender, teakwood, peony and cherry blossom, these candles set a soothing mood throughout the space. Each candle weighs 5 ounces and is housed in a sleek glass jar, blending right into any decor. With one wick per candle, each candle burns evenly, ensuring a rich, subtle infusion of fragrance. 

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
